title: AUTOINCREMENT problem with the INSERT xfer optimization
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, b UNIQUE, c TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO t1(a, b, c) VALUES(888, 9999, NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(x SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, y UNIQUE, z REAL CHECK(z > 0));
INSERT INTO t2(x, y) SELECT a, b FROM t1 WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: AUTOINCREMENT not initialized in final INSERT for table t2
